data.body: Held-out docs validation complete. Standard-tier implementer succeeded in 1 substantive attempt against reuse-surface happy path. Full oracle initially exposed an overly narrow phrase assertion: guide correctly said an analyzer is absent; test accepted only no analyzer/plural. Corrected under revert-first discipline, removed fallback trigger to re-prove RED, restored and GREEN. Mutation removing all size_near_fraction documentation also produced the intended RED, then restored. Focused config/metrics: 109 passed, 2 skipped. make lint GREEN; make typecheck GREEN; make test GREEN: 7117 passed, 37 skipped, 114 deselected.
